items.a: ZAYA is Ethiopia's local-commerce platform connecting neighbourhood shops and their customers — everything near you. Support for diaspora families is on our roadmap.
Yes, in the pilot: merchants run sales, stock and the credit book, plus the supermarket dashboard. The customer app is launching; delivery, smart tools and the diaspora basket are on the roadmap.
Customers use ZAYA free. Merchants start on a free plan with optional paid tiers — see the pricing section or contact us.
The app supports Amharic, Afaan Oromoo, Tigrinya and English. This website is in English for now; the other languages are planned for a later phase.

items.q: Does ZAYA send money for the diaspora?
items.a: No — ZAYA is not a money-transfer service. The plan is to let you order real goods, delivered to your family with proof — this diaspora basket is on our roadmap, not live yet.
Shop owners in Nifas Silk Lafto can join the pilot — reach us through the contact section.
